_comment: Copy to eval/models.json and edit. 'candidates' = the small model(s) an SLM must beat (the would-be base); 'teacher' = frontier distillation ceiling; 'judge' = a DIFFERENT family than the models under test. Update model slugs to current versions. API keys are read from the named env vars, never stored here.

candidates.name: qwen3-4b
candidates._note: serve locally with vLLM or Ollama (OpenAI-compatible). Add 0.6B/1.7B here too to see the size cliff.

teacher.name: claude-teacher
teacher._note: any frontier model; this establishes whether the behavior is achievable at all (the distillation ceiling).

judge.name: gpt-judge
judge._note: MUST be a different family than teacher/candidates so it doesn't grade its own outputs.
